base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dragon_lizardman_variants — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Green dragon / lizardman — 3 palette variants (green/teal/orange). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Green dragon / lizardman — 3 palette variants (green/teal/orange); breathes fire
